resources.title: Conv Layer Parameters
resources.content:
k² × C_in × C_out + C_out

k = filter size
C_in = channels IN (prev layer)
C_out = channels OUT (this layer)
+C_out = bias

resources.title: BatchNorm Parameters
resources.content:
2 × C_out

Skip BN if: First conv (Discriminator) or Last conv (Generator)

resources.title: GAP Parameters
resources.content:
ALWAYS = 0

Global Average Pooling has no learnable parameters.

resources.title: FC Layer Parameters
resources.content:
C_in × C_out + C_out

C_in = last conv's C_out
C_out = number of classes/nodes

resources.title: KLD Gaussian
resources.content:
KLD(P||Q) = log(σ₂/σ₁) + [σ₁² + (μ₁-μ₂)²]/(2σ₂²) - ½

To get KLD(Q||P): swap ALL 1s and 2s

resources.title: VAE Loss
resources.content:
VAE Loss = Reconstruction + KL Divergence

Part 1: (x - x̂)²
Part 2: ½ × (μ² + σ² - log(σ²) - 1)

Shortcut: When μ=0 and σ²=1 → KL = 0

resources.title: Diffusion Formulas
resources.content:
αt = 1 - βt (signal remaining at step t)

ᾱt = α₁ × α₂ × ... × αt (product of all α)

q(xt|x₀) = N(√ᾱt × x₀, (1-ᾱt) × I)

resources.title: DCGAN Parameter Calculator
resources.content:
def conv_params(k, c_in, c_out, include_bn=True):
    return k*k*c_in*c_out + c_out + (2*c_out if include_bn else 0)

def fc_params(c_in, c_out):
    return c_in*c_out + c_out

# Example: Discriminator 64x64 gray, Conv=[25ch, 50ch], 2 classes
k = 3  # filter size
conv1 = k*k*1*25 + 25  # No BN on first layer
conv2 = k*k*25*50 + 50 + 2*50
fc = 50*2 + 2
total = conv1 + conv2 + fc
print(f'Total parameters: {total}')
